title: President of India
name: Droupadi Murmu
text: Droupadi Murmu is the 15th and current President of India since 25 July 2022. She is the first person belonging to the tribal community and also the second woman after Pratibha Patil to hold the office. She previously served as the 9th Governor of Jharkhand from 2015 to 2021.

title: Prime Minister of India
name: Narendra Modi
text: Narendra Modi is the 14th and current Prime Minister of India, serving since May 2014. He is a Member of Parliament for Varanasi and previously served as the Chief Minister of Gujarat from 2001 to 2014.

title: Vice President of India
name: Jagdeep Dhankhar
text: Jagdeep Dhankhar is the 14th and current Vice President of India, serving since 11 August 2022. He previously served as the Governor of West Bengal.
